symptom: Executing an extracted CLI tarball without installing its optional native LibSQL package failed on first storage access. A first Kami run succeeded only because its monorepo cwd accidentally supplied a compatible native package, while Denshin exposed the missing clean-room dependency.
intervention: Discarded both results as conformance evidence, installed the exact local candidate tarball with npm in a separate prefix, then reran both adopters from new isolated homes.
resolution: All retained evidence uses the package-manager-installed candidate. Adopter docs require an explicit installed candidate executable; extracted bytes and ambient workspace dependencies do not qualify.
